taskSample.name: Commencement Date (C.D)/ Signature of the Contract Agreement
Milestone 2 - Sheet Piles (South and North Main walls) - 100m , Sheet Piles of Eastern Closure wall
Milestone 3 - Completion of all Steel Sheet Pile works in accordance with the Design
Milestone 4 - Completion of Vibroflotation W/Stone Columns and Final Tensioning of Tie Rods
Milestone 5 - Completion of Mooring Dolphins Concrete Pile Caps, Inclinometers and Test stations works and Completion of Fascia Beam and Capping Beam concrete works

Milestone 6 - Completion of: Ground Improvement works, Scour Protection works, Cathodic Protection and Grounding works, Installation of all Mooring Dolphins and Jetty Accessories, Settlement monitoring stations
Milestone 7 - Final completion of all of the Works
Performance Security (10% of the Accepted Contract Amount)

mappedFields.Notes: 30/01/25: expected until 02/02/25. Because of the war, nobody was ready to provide insurance. We obtained authorization until 05/01
